epics.title: Sprint ceremony infrastructure
epics.description: File-based agile PM tooling: ralph loop, ceremonies, SMART check, proof-of-work, smoke test, review, retro. The foundation for all subsequent delivery.

epics.title: Cluster bootstrap — VPS provisioning and K3s HA
epics.description: Bootstrap scripts for Hetzner, DigitalOcean, generic VPS. K3s HA with kube-vip. Front door security via Cloudflare tunnel.

epics.title: Cluster foundations — CNI, PKI, policy, secrets bootstrap
epics.description: Cilium CNI with deny-all NetworkPolicy. cert-manager with self-signed CA. Sealed Secrets. Crossplane core. OpenBao dev mode.

epics.title: Self-hosted identity — Keycloak SSO
epics.description: Keycloak with sovereign realm, OIDC clients for all platform services. Replaces any external identity provider dependency.

epics.title: GitOps engine — GitLab + ArgoCD + Harbor
epics.description: Self-hosted Git (GitLab), GitOps (ArgoCD App-of-Apps), container registry (Harbor). No dependency on GitHub, DockerHub, or any external Git host.

epics.title: Autarky vendor system — source-based builds
epics.description: VENDORS.yaml manifest, vendor fetch framework, distroless build recipes (ko for Go), ArgoCD Image Updater pipeline. Every image is built from source and pinned by SHA.

epics.title: Service mesh — Istio mTLS
epics.description: Istio base + istiod, STRICT PeerAuthentication, wildcard Gateway. All service-to-service traffic encrypted and authenticated.

epics.title: Policy enforcement and runtime security
epics.description: OPA/Gatekeeper ConstraintTemplates, Trivy cluster-wide scanning, Falco runtime threat detection.

epics.title: Metrics and dashboards — Prometheus + Grafana
epics.description: kube-prometheus-stack, Keycloak OIDC for Grafana, AlertManager, pre-loaded dashboards for all platform components.

epics.title: Log aggregation and distributed tracing — Loki + Tempo + Thanos
epics.description: Loki in simple scalable mode on Ceph, Tempo distributed tracing, Thanos for long-term Prometheus storage. All on self-hosted Ceph object storage.

epics.title: Developer portal and browser IDE — Backstage + code-server
epics.description: Backstage service catalog auto-discovering all platform services. code-server as the primary browser-based IDE for agents and developers.

epics.title: Code quality history — SonarQube + ReportPortal
epics.description: SonarQube for static analysis history. ReportPortal for test result aggregation across all projects.

epics.title: Testing infrastructure — Selenium, k6, Chaos Mesh, MailHog
epics.description: Persistent browser testing (Selenium Grid), load testing (k6 operator), chaos engineering (Chaos Mesh), email testing (MailHog).

epics.title: Sovereign PM — self-hosted AI-native project management
epics.description: The web app that replaces this file-based PM system. Theme/Epic/Story UI, prd.json generation, Ralph trigger, agent run history.

epics.title: HA validation and integration testing — kind-based
epics.description: kind cluster setup, chart smoke tests in kind, cost gate on bootstrap scripts, PDB chaos validation.
